message:
perf: switch to WASM tiktoken for 4000x faster tokenization

Replace js-tiktoken (pure JS) with WASM-based tiktoken package.

Performance on real code:
- 10K chars: 8000ms → 2ms (4000x faster)
- 100K chars: would hang → 17ms
- 256K chars: would hang → 37ms

This completely resolves scanning hangs (Issue #3) while providing
accurate token counts instead of byte estimation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
